mapper.select: SELECT mr.request_id AS requestId, mr.mentee_id AS menteeId, e.employee_name AS menteeName, mr.mentoring_field AS mentoringField, mr.request_title AS requestTitle, mr.request_content AS requestContent, mr.request_status AS requestStatus, mr.created_at AS requestedAt FROM mentoring_request mr LEFT JOIN employee e ON mr.mentee_id = e.employee_id WHERE mr.mentee_id = #{menteeId} ORDER BY mr.created_at DESC

SELECT m.mentoring_id AS mentoringId, m.request_id AS requestId, m.mentor_id AS mentorId, em.employee_name AS mentorName, m.mentee_id AS menteeId, ee.employee_name AS menteeName, mr.mentoring_field AS mentoringField, m.mentoring_status AS mentoringStatus, m.created_at AS startedAt, m.updated_at AS completedAt FROM mentoring m LEFT JOIN mentoring_request mr ON m.request_id = mr.request_id LEFT JOIN employee em ON m.mentor_id = em.employee_id LEFT JOIN employee ee ON m.mentee_id = ee.employee_id WHERE m.mentor_id = #{mentorId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.mentoring_id AS mentoringId, m.request_id AS requestId, m.mentor_id AS mentorId, em.employee_name AS mentorName, m.mentee_id AS menteeId, ee.employee_name AS menteeName, mr.mentoring_field AS mentoringField, m.mentoring_status AS mentoringStatus, m.created_at AS startedAt, m.updated_at AS completedAt FROM mentoring m LEFT JOIN mentoring_request mr ON m.request_id = mr.request_id LEFT JOIN employee em ON m.mentor_id = em.employee_id LEFT JOIN employee ee ON m.mentee_id = ee.employee_id WHERE m.mentee_id = #{menteeId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.mentoring_id AS mentoringId, m.request_id AS requestId, m.mentor_id AS mentorId, em.employee_name AS mentorName, m.mentee_id AS menteeId, ee.employee_name AS menteeName, mr.mentoring_field AS mentoringField, m.mentoring_status AS mentoringStatus, m.created_at AS startedAt, m.updated_at AS completedAt FROM mentoring m LEFT JOIN mentoring_request mr ON m.request_id = mr.request_id LEFT JOIN employee em ON m.mentor_id = em.employee_id LEFT JOIN employee ee ON m.mentee_id = ee.employee_id WHERE m.mentoring_status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT mr.request_id AS requestId, mr.mentee_id AS menteeId, e.employee_name AS menteeName, mr.mentoring_field AS mentoringField, mr.request_title AS requestTitle, mr.request_content AS requestContent, mr.request_status AS requestStatus, mr.created_at AS requestedAt FROM mentoring_request mr LEFT JOIN employee e ON mr.mentee_id = e.employee_id WHERE mr.request_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY mr.created_at DESC LIMIT 10
